reason: The text does not support the statement that a righteous person is spared while the city he is in is destroyed. In the provided text, Elijah, a righteous prophet, is sought after to be killed by Jezebel, but he is not spared due to the destruction of the city. Instead, he flees for his life and faces threats to his life from Jezebel, demonstrating that the righteous person is not necessarily spared in this context.
